name: Terraform (Docker)
description: Connect to the HashiCorp Terraform ecosystem via Docker. Search the public Terraform Registry for providers, modules, and policies, read documentation, and (with an optional token) interact with HCP Terraform / Terraform Enterprise workspaces and runs in an isolated container.

inputs.label: HCP Terraform / Terraform Enterprise API Token
inputs.description: Optional API token for HCP Terraform or Terraform Enterprise. Leave empty to use only the public Terraform Registry. Provide a token to access private registries, workspaces, and runs.

obtain.instructions:
1. Sign in to HCP Terraform (or your Terraform Enterprise instance)
2. Open User Settings > Tokens (or a Team/Organization token)
3. Create an API token
4. Copy the token value

inputs.label: HCP Terraform / TFE Address
inputs.description: Optional base URL for HCP Terraform or a self-hosted Terraform Enterprise instance. Defaults to https://app.terraform.io when left empty.

auth.instructions: No token is required to search the public Terraform Registry. Provide a TFE_TOKEN (and optionally TFE_ADDRESS) to access HCP Terraform / Terraform Enterprise private registries, workspaces, and runs.
